name: Chocolate Macaroon Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Prepare a 12-cup Bundt pan with cooking spray and flour.
3. To prepare the batter, combine flour, sugar, cocoa powder (sifted), salt, and baking soda in a mixing bowl.
4. In another mixing bowl, beat together water, margarine, sour cream, and egg whites until combined.
5. Mix the dry ingredients into the wet ingredients just until moistened.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
7. Meanwhile, to prepare the topping, combine the remaining egg white, sugar, coconut, flour, and vanilla in a mixing bowl.
8. Drop spoonfuls of the topping over the chocolate batter.
9. Bake for 60 minutes.
